candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue figure; matches definition of total revenue/sales and is the primary revenue line.

candidates.row_label: Contract Assets - Short-Term - Unbilled Revenue in Excess of Advance Consideration & Progress Billings
candidates.why: Balance sheet contract asset, not a P&L revenue line; does not match REVT definition.
Represents other income, not core total revenue; should not be used as primary REVT when a clear total revenue line exists.
Appears to be another other-income label and is nan in preview; not the main revenue line.

variables.notes: Use 'Total Revenue' as the single prioritized revenue line; others are supplemental/other income.
No suitable COGS/cost of sales line among candidates; direct property/operating costs are not provided as candidates, so COGS is set to 0 by rule.

candidates.why: Overhead-type property administration costs; part of SG&A/operating overhead, not a total or COGS.
Appears to be direct property operating costs (more COGS-like) rather than overhead SG&A; less appropriate for SG&A per instructions.
Explicit SG&A labor costs; clear SG&A component line.
Administrative overhead expenses; classic SG&A component.
Mixed income/expense line; not a clean SG&A component and may be non-operating; include only if no better SG&A lines exist.

candidates.row_label: Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental
candidates.why: Direct operating expenses tied to rental properties; more like COGS for real estate than SG&A overhead.
Explicit SG&A line; should be included as a primary SG&A component per hierarchy, even if some cells are sparse.
Balance sheet asset, not an expense; not SG&A.
Balance sheet asset; not an expense item.
Accumulated depreciation on assets; excluded from SG&A by rule (D&A not to be included).

variables.notes: Selected explicit SG&A and clearly overhead-type components; excluded property operating expenses (more like COGS) and balance sheet/DA items.
No R&D-related lines are present in the candidate list; treat XRD as missing/zero per instructions.

candidates.why: P&L interest and finance expense line; good candidate for interest expense, but slightly less granular than gross interest expenses.
Represents interest income, opposite sign of interest expense; should not be used for XINT which captures expense.
Interest capitalized to assets rather than expensed; not pure interest expense but related. Use only if no direct expense lines available.
Direct gross interest expense line; best representation of interest expense for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of interest expense related to lease liabilities; suitable as a secondary/backup interest expense line.
Represents profit attributable to NCI, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interest; equity interest, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest expense; appropriate as a lower-priority backup.
Balance sheet liability, not the P&L expense itself.
Equity line, not interest expense.
Equity line, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list ordered by specificity and coverage of interest expense; capitalized interest and interest income are excluded from XINT.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not a balance sheet equity level; not appropriate for BE.
Represents equity attributable to shareholders; good candidate but may exclude non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of parent
candidates.why: Equity of the parent’s shareholders only, excluding NCI; narrower than total equity but still valid if total equity were missing.
Comprehensive total equity (including non-controlling interests); best match for book equity definition.
Balancing artifact, not an actual reported equity total; should not be used if proper totals exist.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing artifact for the accounting identity; not a pure equity figure.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of parent

variables.notes: Use Total equity as primary BE, with shareholder-only equity lines as backups if needed.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to NCI; a flow, not stock, but clearly identifies minority interests.
Income statement minority interests line; also a flow, closely related to NCI.
Balance sheet stock of non-controlling interests; best representation of minority interest (MIB).
Alternative label for balance sheet non-controlling interest; good backup line.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income flow attributable to NCI, not the balance sheet amount.

variables.notes: Use balance sheet NCI lines for MIB (stock of minority interests), with both labels prioritized.
